channel.title: about on Hello, I'm Jae
channel.description: Recent content in about on Hello, I'm Jae

item.title: Hi, my name is Jae.
item.description: Hi, my name is Jae. I’m Lighting TD at ICON Creative Studio, Vancouver, Canada. I started my career as lighter and compositor at animation studio, and kept moving to the technical side step by step. I like learning and digging something new. My interests are shading, rendering and cutting-edge real time related technology. For better understanding on them, I’m taking CS courses as part time student. My goal is making something beautiful and useful using real time technologies.
